hooks.command: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git fetch --quiet origin sandbox main 2>/dev/null; git rev-parse --verify --quiet origin/sandbox >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git rev-parse --verify --quiet origin/main >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; if [ -n "$(git diff origin/main...origin/sandbox 2>/dev/null)" ]; then files=$(git diff --name-only origin/main...origin/sandbox 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); printf '{"systemMessage":"Reminder: sandbox has unpromoted changes in %s file(s) not yet on main. Open a PR sandbox -> main to promote to prod."}\n' "$files"; fi; exit 0

cd /home/user/ToolTimePro-Ai && git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=d 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' && { echo 'Running build check...' >&2; npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5; EXIT=$?; if [ $EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"stopReason": "Build failed! Fix TypeScript/lint errors before pushing."}'; exit 1; fi; } || true
